project_info.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 4 (High-Contrast Premium)
project_info.vibe: Appetizing, trustworthy, fresh, editorial food magazine, premium local brand

rules: Use #FAF9F6 (Warm Bone-White) as the dominant background to let food imagery pop.
Use #1A1A1A (Rich Charcoal Black) for high-contrast typography.
Use #F2A900 (Saffron Gold) strictly for CTAs, highlights, and the WhatsApp button.
Avoid muddy shadows; use crisp borders or high-contrast separation.
Never use pure #000000; stick to the charcoal black for softer but stark contrast.

fonts.installation: Import both fonts via Google Fonts in index.css or via Next.js/React font tools.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.overline: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-semibold text-[#F2A900]

rules: Headings must use Playfair Display to evoke an editorial, premium culinary feel.
Body text must use Outfit for extreme legibility and modern cleanliness.
Avoid bold body text. Rely on font weight contrast (e.g., light body, bold headings).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding. p-8 to p-24 for section paddings. Let the food breathe.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid for the 'Why Choose Us' and 'Inspiration' sections. Asymmetric layouts with generous gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense copy, center-align hero text only if visually balanced over the image.
layout_and_spacing.container: Max-width screen-xl (1280px) for standard sections, edge-to-edge for hero and large product galleries.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F2A900] text-[#1A1A1A] font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#D99700] transition-colors flex items-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#1A1A1A] font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.style: Cardless approach preferred. Use large, edge-to-edge images with text placed directly on the #FAF9F6 background below or beside the image. If cards are needed, use flat background, 0px border-radius, and 1px #1A1A1A border for a brutalist-premium touch.

components_and_surface_styles.glassmorphism: Use 'Crystal' glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-[#1A1A1A]/10) for the sticky navigation header to ensure food imagery remains visible underneath.

image_urls.alt: Cinematic kitchen countertop with warm golden lighting
Elegant abstract cream and liquid gold texture
Macro photography of creamy yogurt with honey and berries
Fresh ground ginger paste in dark ceramic bowl
Delicious paneer indian dish with spinach
Indian food bowls with paneer and spices

image_urls.category: Community / Why Choose Us - NZ Made

media_and_assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for crisp UI icons (WhatsApp icon, arrows, checkmarks). Keep stroke-width to 1.5 for elegance.

page_sections.name: Navigation Bar
page_sections.guidelines: Sticky crystal glass header (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-[#FAF9F6]/80). Black text. Logo on left, Nav links center, secondary 'Order Now' or WhatsApp CTA on right.

page_sections.name: Hero Section
page_sections.guidelines: Full height (min-h-screen) using 'Hero Background' image. Overlay with a subtle bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 to-transparent. Left-aligned typography. Playfair Display H1: 'Freshness Rooted in Tradition, Made in New Zealand'. Large WhatsApp CTA button (#F2A900).

page_sections.name: Marquee
page_sections.guidelines: Right below hero. '100% VEGETARIAN • NZ MADE • GELATIN FREE • GLUTEN FREE • TRUSTED LOCALLY'. Use the abstract gold texture as background or a solid #1A1A1A block with #F2A900 text.

page_sections.name: Why Choose Guru Foods (Trust Section)
page_sections.guidelines: Asymmetric Bento Grid mixing the Auckland City image with text blocks. Emphasize 'NZ-made freshness' vs 'Imported'. High contrast. Background #FAF9F6. Use oversized typography for statistics or key phrases.

page_sections.name: Products Section
page_sections.guidelines: Cardless design. Large alternate left/right layout (Image on one side, text on the other). Showcase Paneer, Yogurt, Cream, Ginger Paste. For Yogurt, strictly use the tagline: 'NZ made 100% vegetarian, gelatin free, gluten-free packed with natural goodness - pairs perfectly with fresh berries, oats and a sprinkle of happiness'. Images to use: Yogurt Macro, Ginger Paste, Paneer Dish 1.

page_sections.name: Food Inspiration Gallery
page_sections.guidelines: Masonry or staggered 3-column grid showing how the food is used. Paneer curries, Yogurt bowls. Hover effect: slight scale up and dimming with dish name overlay. Minimal borders.

page_sections.name: Where to Buy & Community
page_sections.guidelines: Solid #1A1A1A background section. Gold (#F2A900) and White text. Highlight 'Available at Indian Grocery Shops across Auckland'. Add a map aesthetic or list of key areas.

page_sections.name: About Brand & Footer
page_sections.guidelines: Generous spacing (py-24). Brand story on left, large floating WhatsApp CTA on right. Clean footer with links.

page_sections.name: Sticky Global Element
page_sections.guidelines: A fixed circular WhatsApp button (green or the brand gold) floating at bottom-right of the screen at all times. Z-index 50.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST build this page using pure HTML+Tailwind for layouts, as this is a high-end marketing page. Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards for the main sections; use raw divs with the specific spacings provided.
Implement pure CSS or framer-motion staggered animations for the inspiration gallery.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are attached to all interactive elements, particularly the WhatsApp buttons.
Include 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' fonts via Google Fonts.
Make the sticky header use backdrop-blur and semi-transparent background so the hero image subtly shows through on scroll.
WhatsApp link must point to: https://wa.me/64221299323
Do NOT use placeholder images. Rely strictly on the media_urls array provided.
Maintain the #FAF9F6 background color across the main body to give an organic, premium feel rather than standard stark white.
